pages.rationale: This is the front cover of the document containing only the title and date range.
This page lists the table of contents for the first six sections of the document.
This is a continuation of the table of contents covering sections 6 through 11.
Contains introductory remarks from the publisher and legal copyright information.

pages.subtopic: RBI Monetary Policy and Surplus Transfer
pages.rationale: Extremely dense with core UPSC concepts: Quantitative/Qualitative tools (Repo, CRR, SLR), Bimal Jalan Committee, and Economic Capital Framework.

pages.subtopic: Forex Reserves and Integrated Ombudsman Scheme
pages.rationale: High-value content on Forex components (SDR, RTP), gold reserve logic, and the Integrated Ombudsman Scheme (RB-IOS).
Covers technical liquidity tools like SDF, VRRR, and Switch Auctions, plus co-lending norms which are frequent prelims topics.
Contains critical details on Ways and Means Advances (WMA), Unified Lending Interface (ULI), CBDC, and Certificate of Deposits.
Detailed comparison between NBFCs and Banks, and the structural/regulatory framework of Regional Rural Banks (RRBs).

pages.subtopic: Small Finance Banks and Universal Banking
pages.rationale: Explains the transition criteria from SFB to Universal Bank and the basic objectives of SFBs.
Discusses significant changes in Priority Sector Lending (PSL) for SFBs and the legal mechanics of the SARFAESI Act for NPA recovery.
Covers international messaging (SWIFT), India Post Payments Bank features, and the Prompt Corrective Action (PCA) framework for UCBs.

pages.subtopic: CAR and Financial Fraud Risk Indicator
pages.rationale: Relatively thin page with only two definitions: Capital Adequacy Ratio and the new FRI metric.
Detailed overview of the FRBM Act targets, CAG compliance findings, and debt-to-GDP trends.
High conceptual density regarding types of deficits (Fiscal, Primary, Revenue) and the fundamental differences between Direct and Indirect taxes.

pages.subtopic: Income Tax Act 2025 and Safe Harbour
pages.rationale: Covers the new Income Tax Act features (MAT, AMT, Virtual Assets) and Advance Pricing Agreements (APAs).
Very high signal content on the 101st Amendment, GST 1.0 vs 2.0, and technical terms like Arm's Length Pricing and STT.

pages.subtopic: GST Rate Rationalization and GST Council
pages.rationale: Details the new two-slab GST structure and the constitutional composition/voting powers of the GST Council (Article 279A).
Contains clear definitions and distinctions between Anti-Dumping and Safeguard duties, plus a conceptual explanation of off-budget borrowing and its impact on fiscal transparency.
High-density page comparing Money vs Capital markets with specific instruments, and detailed statutory/governance structure of SEBI including the SWAGAT-FI framework.
Covers REITs, InvITs, and a detailed three-category classification of Alternative Investment Funds (AIFs), which are frequent UPSC themes.

pages.subtopic: GIFT City IFSC and Bond Yields
pages.rationale: Explains the Foreign Currency Settlement System (FCSS), the regulatory status of GIFT City, and the conceptual 'see-saw' relationship between bond prices and yields.
Discusses Transition Bonds, AT1 (Perpetual) Bonds, and the specific composition/tenure of the Payments Regulatory Board under the PSS Act 2007.
Dense with facts on UPI's international expansion, NPCI's institutional structure, BSE's 150-year history, and the basics of Sovereign Credit Ratings.
A thin page continuing the discussion on SCR agencies and their rating grades; limited unique facts compared to previous pages.

pages.subtopic: FDI vs FPI and FDI Routes
pages.rationale: Provides a high-quality comparison between FDI and FPI impacts on the market and details the Automatic vs Government routes for FDI.
Lists prohibited FDI sectors, FPI-to-FDI reclassification rules, and introduces the Special Rupee Vostro Account (SRVA) mechanism.
Explains the mechanics of Vostro vs Nostro accounts and the distinction between Current and Capital Account convertibility in India.
Contains the REER formula, significant remittance statistics for India, and the eligibility/limits of the Liberalised Remittance Scheme (LRS).
Very high signal page detailing the India-UK FTA highlights and the hierarchical classification of trade agreements (PTA, FTA, CEPA, etc.).
Covers the unique binding investment commitments in the India-EFTA deal and the architecture of the new Export Promotion Mission.
Focuses on specific export data for 2024-25 and the Credit Guarantee Scheme for Exporters (CGSE).
Highly conceptual page explaining supply-demand shifts and the impact of inflation on price elasticity across different good types (Necessity vs Luxury).
Features a critical comparison table between WPI, CPI, and the proposed PPI, including measurement points, taxes, and basket composition.
Detailed breakdown of the Global MPI methodology, including the 3 dimensions, 10 indicators, and the calculation of incidence vs intensity.
Covers India's National MPI (12 indicators) and provides conceptual definitions for the Kuznets Ratio, Palma Ratio, Gini Index, and Lorenz Curve.
Contains detailed parameters and weights of the RBI FI-Index, and the composition/role of the Financial Stability and Development Council (FSDC).
High density of facts regarding external debt composition, internal debt percentages, and the legal framework including FRBM Act targets and RBI Act provisions.
Detailed components of AMRUT 2.0 (Pey Jal Survekshan, etc.) and IMF World Economic Outlook data on India's global economic standing.
Dense conceptual content on GDP calculation methods (SNA 2008), National Income subcategories (NNP, PI, PDI), and the new MoSPI Capex Survey.
Covers the definition of Capex vs Revenue expenditure, the UN ISAR mandate, and India's performance in the Human Development Report 2025.
Focuses on the specific indicators and dimensions of the HDI and global trends in inequality.
Extremely dense with targets, achievements, and structural details of PMMSY, plus statistical data on the Indian fisheries sector.
Detailed breakdown of a major new agricultural scheme, including its financial outlay, target districts, and convergence of 36 existing schemes.
Covers the modernization of command area development and the launch of the Mission for Aatmanirbharta in Pulses with specific timelines.
Contains state-wise production data for pulses, the SATHI portal details, and the establishment of the National Turmeric Board.
High-value content on turmeric GI tags/production and a comprehensive summary of MS Swaminathan's contributions to the Green and Evergreen Revolutions.
Detailed facts on Makhana (GI tag, production stats) and the four major varieties of natural silk produced in India.
Covers climatic conditions for cotton, the legal framework for opium under the NDPS Act, and the BHARATI initiative for agri-startups.
Details several digital platforms (Bhandaran 360, ANNA DARPAN, ASHA) and the International Potato Centre's regional wing in India.
Provides eligibility and features of the KCC scheme and a list of UN-designated international years and decades.
Explains the consolidation of 29 laws into 4 codes and defines critical terms like Fixed-Term Employment, Layoff, and Retrenchment.

pages.subtopic: Code on Wages & Industrial Relations Code
pages.rationale: Dense factual and conceptual content on the specific provisions of the Wage Code (2019) and the Industrial Relations Code (2020).
Covers social security for gig workers, the definition of wages for gratuity, and occupational safety standards for women and migrant workers.

pages.subtopic: Periodic Labour Force Survey (PLFS) and Labour Norms
pages.rationale: This page contains critical definitions for UPSC Prelims such as LFPR, WPR, Unemployment Rate, and Activity Status (Usual vs CWS), along with updated norms for contract labour.
Dense with multiple government schemes including PMKVY 4.0, PM-NAPS, JSS, and DDU-GKY, plus the new India Skills Accelerator initiative with WEF.

pages.subtopic: PM-SETU, ITIs, and Global Capability Centres (GCC)
pages.rationale: Covers the hub-and-spoke model of PM-SETU, the structure of ITIs, and the economic significance of Global Capability Centres in India.
Focuses on the conceptual difference between minimum and living wages, including the constitutional link to Article 43.

pages.subtopic: Competition Commission of India (CCI) and PMMY
pages.rationale: Provides institutional details of CCI, recent amendments like Deal Value Threshold, and the introduction to Pradhan Mantri Mudra Yojana.

pages.subtopic: PMMY Categories and Global Innovation Index (GII)
pages.rationale: Detailed breakdown of MUDRA loan categories (Shishu, Kishor, Tarun, Tarun Plus) and the introduction to the Global Innovation Index 2025.

pages.subtopic: GII 2025 Highlights and Nobel Prize in Economics 2025
pages.rationale: Contains specific rankings for India in GII and detailed conceptual explanations of 'Creative Destruction' and prerequisites for growth from the 2025 Nobel laureates.
Extremely high-value page with a comprehensive table on IPR types (GI, Patents, Copyright, etc.), their terms of protection, and administering ministries.
Explains the legal criteria for Corporate Social Responsibility (CSR) in India and the emerging economic concept of 'Reverse Flipping' for startups.

pages.subtopic: Fugitive Economic Offenders and Women Entrepreneurship
pages.rationale: Covers the Fugitive Economic Offenders Act 2018 criteria and the 'We Rise' initiative for women-led MSMEs.
Lists major ports, productivity indicators, and the funding/objectives of the Sagarmala Programme.

pages.subtopic: Sagarmala Framework and Indian Ports Act 2025
pages.rationale: Details the institutional framework (NSAC, SCSC) and key features of the new Indian Ports Act 2025, including the Maritime State Development Council.
High density of regulatory facts: MARPOL, BWM Convention, Hague-Visby Rules, and the suite of 2025 shipping modernization acts.

pages.subtopic: Vizhinjam Port and National Road Safety Board
pages.rationale: Covers India's first deep-water transshipment port (Vizhinjam) and the statutory constitution of the National Road Safety Board.

pages.subtopic: Road Safety Initiatives and Bharat NCAP
pages.rationale: Dense with facts on the Brasilia Declaration, Good Samaritan laws, Cashless Treatment Scheme 2025, and the Bharat NCAP 2.0 framework.
Detailed institutional profiles of DGCA, AERA, BCAS, AAIB, and the International Civil Aviation Organization (ICAO).

pages.subtopic: Accident Governance and National Logistics Policy
pages.rationale: Features a comparative table of accident governance across sectors and the targets/engines of the National Logistics Policy 2022.
Covers the LEADS Index, ULIP, SMILE program, and specific models of asset monetization like TOT and DBFOT.

The page covers specific mechanisms of asset monetization (NLMC, Project-based financing) and the 10th anniversary of the Digital India Mission, including its nine pillars and key achievements like BHASHINI. High factual density for prelims.
Contains specific details on strategic infrastructure projects like USBRL (Chenab Bridge), Bairabi-Sairang Rail Link, and Z-Morh Tunnel. Good for location-based or feature-based questions.
Discusses NITI Aayog reports on the services sector, highlighting GVA contributions versus employment shares and urban-rural/gender disparities. Useful for statement-based conceptual questions.
Provides detailed institutional data on the ASI (MoSPI, NSO, legal framework) and its coverage/exclusions. Also introduces the Index of Industrial Production (IIP) with recent frequency updates.

Extremely dense page covering the technical details of IIP (base year, scope, weights) and the significant update to NIC 2025 (6-digit structure, inclusion of digital/green economy). Highly relevant for UPSC.
Contains critical data on India's manufacturing GDP share and global standing. Detailed breakdown of the India Semiconductor Mission (ISM) and its various sub-schemes (Fabs, DLI, etc.).
Covers the new Electronics Component Manufacturing Scheme (ECMS) with its fiscal incentive structures and introduces the Mines and Minerals (Development and Regulation) Amendment Act, 2025.

pages.subtopic: MMDR Act Amendments & District Mineral Foundation (DMF)
pages.rationale: Detailed amendments to the MMDR Act including the NMEDT, mineral exchanges, and removal of captive mine limits. Also introduces the District Mineral Foundation (DMF).
High-value page covering the constitutional entries for mining (Union vs State list), the regulatory authority for minor minerals, and the specific funding/allocation rules for PMKKKY.
Discusses the Offshore Areas Atomic Minerals Rules 2025 and the geographical distribution of Uranium and Thorium in India. Also covers Bauxite/Aluminium reserves.
Covers Copper reserves/production, the first successful auction of Potash and Halite blocks, and the recent discovery of natural gas in the Andaman Basin.
Provides a state-wise breakdown of natural gas reserves and details the statutory role and functions of the Petroleum and Natural Gas Regulatory Board (PNGRB).

pages.subtopic: Coal Sector Reforms & New Steel Policy
pages.rationale: Dense content on the coal sector (SHAKTI policy, commercial mining, sustainability) and the introduction of the revised Domestically Manufactured Iron & Steel Products (DMI&SP) Policy 2025.
Detailed features of the Steel Policy (Melt & Pour, DVA) and the PM MITRA scheme for textiles, including the 5F vision, SPV structure, and park locations.
Overview of the textile sector's economic contribution, definition of Sunrise Sectors, SEZ Amendment Rules 2025, and the regulatory framework for Hallmarking under BIS.
Covers the Quality Council of India (QCI) governance and the MAHA-MedTech Mission launched by ANRF. Includes data on India's position in the global medical devices market.
Promotional material regarding Vision IAS results and course schedules.
Promotional material listing successful candidates and contact information.
